title: vulkan-create-compatibility
description: Fixes VulkanMod + Create crashes on Fabric 1.20.1 by remapping unsupported depth/stencil formats, framebuffer attachments and other things
body:
**This mod fixes crashes when using VulkanMod together with Create on Fabric**

It resolves common issues like:

Framebuffer errors (e.g. 36013, 34041)
Stencil / depth format incompatibilities
Rendering crashes in Create UI and world

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
⚙ **How it works**
Patches incompatible OpenGL paths between Create and VulkanMod by remapping unsupported framebuffer formats,stencil usage and other

  - Client Side Only
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Tested with**

Create (Fabric)

VulkanMod

Fabric API

vulkan-create-compatibility


# Links
Curseforge:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vulkan-create-compatibility
